tools.name: autocomplete.getAutocompleteSuggestions
tools.description: Lists the suggested terms and attributes similar to the search term.

tools.name: productListPage.getBannersFacets
tools.description: Lists the banners registered for a given query. Check the [configuring banners documentation](https://help.vtex.com/en/tracks/vtex-intelligent-search--19wrbB7nEQcmwzDPl1l4Cb/4ViKEivLJtJsvpaW0aqIQ5) for a full explanation of the banner feature.

tools.name: productListPage.getCorrectionSearch
tools.description: Tries to correct a misspelled term from the search.

tools.name: productListPage.getFacetsFacets
tools.description: Lists the possible facets for a given query

tools.name: productListPage.getProductSearchFacets
tools.description: Lists the products for a given query.

tools.name: productListPage.getSearchSuggestions
tools.description: Lists suggested terms similar to the search term.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
